steps.title: Find one object's mass
steps.content:
If $r$ identical objects have total mass $t$, then each object has mass:
$$
\frac{t}{r}
$$

steps.title: Scale to more objects
steps.content: For $96r$ objects, multiply the number of objects by the mass per object: $$ 96r\cdot\frac{t}{r}=96t $$ The answer is D.
